name: Reorder List
description: Given a singly linked list L0 -> L1 -> ... -> Ln-1 -> Ln, reorder it to L0 -> Ln -> L1 -> Ln-1 -> L2 -> Ln-2 -> ... Do it in-place. Hint: find middle, reverse second half, merge alternately.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 5 * 10^4]. 1 <= Node.val <= 1000.

performance.stress_intent: separate split-reverse-merge or equivalent linear reorder strategies from repeated tail-scanning implementations on max-size lists

python_template:
